info.title: jenlooper.com
info.description: Read-only, statically published personal site. No public authenticated write or programmatic submission API. Content is available as HTML, with sitemap and robots in /.well-known and the site root. OpenID Connect discovery (/.well-known/openid-configuration) documents OAuth/OIDC metadata; this site is public and does not require tokens for read access. Authorization and token endpoints return not_implemented.

externalDocs.description: OpenID Connect discovery 1.0 (issuer, endpoints, JWKS URI)

get.summary: Service status (API catalog / RFC 8631 link relation: status)
